violations.text: The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door low boy on the cooking line. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the three bay. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The floor in the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The ice machine was emptied at the time of inspection. Ice machine and slicer are not to be used until they are cleaned and sanitized. Establishment is to send picture of ice machine to inspector once it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. The containers were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the flat top grills. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment is to change the wooden cutting blocks with nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The following equipment was observed in poor repair. -Refrigerator door gaskets at the bar -Hot water knob at the kitchen hand sink -The faucet at the 3-bay sink Equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators at the bar have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink behind the breakfast bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023
Produce and eggs were observed stored on the floor in the walk in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Staff were observed not wearing beard restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrective Action - Establishment is to obtain beard restraints for employees to wear. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Wood is used in the construction of the flat top grills. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment is to change the wooden cutting blocks with nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2023

The Faucets on the hand sink in the kitchen are in poor repair. Establishment must fix the faucets. Establishment must provide RIDOH with proof of correction. New Violation correct by 11/15/23 The coving by the back kitchen exit is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
